title: rosa × polliniana var. acutifolia
intro: Rosa × polliniana var. acutifolia, commonly known as the Chinese rose, is a hybrid rose species known for its unique, fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. This plant is prized for its ability to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its high content of antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Rosa × polliniana var. acutifolia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and sought-after natural remedy in traditional Chinese medicine.
